title: Camp program types
description: Programs and audiences a camp offers (multi-valued on camp.program_types). Distinct from the rank `program` vocabulary (cub_scouts, scouts_bsa, venturing, sea_scouts), which classifies advancement programs, not camps.

terms.label: Scouts BSA Resident Camp
terms.description: Overnight summer camp programming for Scouts BSA troops.

terms.label: Cub Scout Resident Camp
terms.description: Overnight camp for Cub Scouts, often attended with an adult partner.

terms.label: Cub Scout Day Camp
terms.description: Daytime camp programming for Cub Scouts, without overnight stays.

terms.label: Webelos Camp
terms.description: Camp programming aimed at Webelos and Arrow of Light Cub Scouts.

terms.label: High Adventure
terms.description: Advanced backcountry, aquatics, or expedition programming for older youth.

terms.label: Short-Term Camping
terms.description: Weekend or primitive camping use by units.

terms.label: Sea Scout
terms.description: Aquatics and sailing programming for Sea Scout ships.

terms.label: Family Camping
terms.description: Camping programs open to whole families.

terms.label: Training
terms.description: Adult or youth leader training programs.
